mapper.update: UPDATE table_reservations SET status = #{status} WHERE reservation_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{code}
SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(reservation_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT(#{datePrefix}, '%')
SELECT reservation_id FROM table_reservations WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tableId}, reserved_table_ids) AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT reservation_id, reservation_time, within_15h, customer_name, customer_phone, table_selection_mode, table_config_desc, group_type, status FROM table_reservations WHERE status IN ('PRE_CONFIRMED', 'DELAYED') ORDER BY -- 🔧 优先级排序：1.5小时内优先 → 时间早的优先 CASE WHEN within_15h = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, reservation_time ASC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order AS preOrder, is_prepaid AS isPrepaid, prepaid_amount AS prepaidAmount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id = #{id}

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order, is_prepaid, prepaid_amount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tableId}, reserved_table_ids) AND status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_config_desc, table_selection_mode, status FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeFragment}, '%') AND status = 'PRE_CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_config_desc, table_selection_mode, status FROM table_reservations WHERE customer_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phoneLast4}) AND status = 'PRE_CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC

SELECT reservation_id, customer_name, customer_phone, reservation_time, table_count, table_config_desc, group_type, reserved_table_ids, table_selection_mode, manual_table_numbers, status, within_15h, pre_order AS preOrder, is_prepaid AS isPrepaid, prepaid_amount AS prepaidAmount, notes, created_at FROM table_reservations WHERE reservation_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{codeFragment}, '%') AND status = 'PRE_CONFIRMED' ORDER BY reservation_time DESC
